output.summary: Added three new behaviors to the Accordion block: exclusive mode (only one item open at a time), always-one-open (prevents closing last open item when exclusive mode is enabled), and kept the charcoal border outline visible when an accordion item is open.

changes: Added 'exclusiveMode' boolean attribute with default false
Added 'alwaysOneOpen' boolean attribute with default false

filesModified.purpose: Added behavior controls in InspectorControls and data attributes for JS consumption
changes: Added ToggleControl import
Added exclusiveMode and alwaysOneOpen to AccordionAttributes type
Added new 'Behavior' PanelBody in InspectorControls (shown for all variations)
Added 'Only one open at a time' toggle for exclusiveMode
Added conditional 'Always keep one open' toggle (only visible when exclusiveMode is true)
Added data-exclusive-mode and data-always-one-open attributes to accordion items wrapper div

filesModified.purpose: Added data attributes matching TSX for frontend JS
changes: Added data-exclusive-mode attribute to accordion items wrapper div
Added data-always-one-open attribute to accordion items wrapper div

filesModified.purpose: Implemented exclusive mode and always-one-open JavaScript behavior
changes: Added accordion behavior section after existing video handler code
Implemented exclusive mode: when one item opens, all siblings close
Implemented always-one-open: prevents closing last open item
Auto-opens first item on page load if alwaysOneOpen is enabled and no items have openByDefault
Uses direct event listeners on each <details> element (not delegation) for Safari compatibility
Uses processing flag to prevent recursive toggle handling

filesModified.purpose: Changed border styling to keep charcoal outline when open
changes: Removed 'open:border-accent-lighter' class
Border now stays charcoal when open (removed from line 63)

filesModified.purpose: Changed border styling to match TSX
changes: Removed 'open:border-accent-lighter' class
Border now stays charcoal when open (line 2)

attributesAdded.name: exclusiveMode
attributesAdded.description: When true, only one accordion item can be open at a time

attributesAdded.name: alwaysOneOpen
attributesAdded.description: When true (and exclusiveMode is also true), prevents closing the last remaining open accordion item

warnings: Bundle size warnings (expected, not related to changes)
Linter warnings in other blocks (not related to changes)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP are in sync. Data attributes match exactly. Border styling changes applied to both TSX and PHP.

testPage.reason: This is a modification to an existing block. Test page should be updated manually or via QA to test new behaviors.
testPage.testingNotes: QA should verify: (1) exclusive mode closes siblings when one opens, (2) always-one-open prevents closing last item, (3) auto-opens first item when alwaysOneOpen enabled with no default open items, (4) border stays charcoal when open

fixesApplied.description: Added exclusive mode behavior - only one accordion item can be open at a time
Added always-one-open behavior - prevents closing last open item when exclusive mode is enabled
fixesApplied.notes: Per additional design decision: when alwaysOneOpen is enabled but no items have openByDefault=true, JS auto-opens first accordion item on page load

fixesApplied.description: Removed open:border-accent-lighter so border stays charcoal when accordion item is open

implementationNotes.safariCompatibility: The toggle event does NOT bubble in Safari. Used direct event listeners on each <details> element instead of delegation.
implementationNotes.recursionPrevention: Used isProcessing flag to prevent infinite loops when programmatically opening/closing items
implementationNotes.autoOpenBehavior: When alwaysOneOpen is enabled and no items have openByDefault=true, the first item is auto-opened on page load (per user's additional design decision)
implementationNotes.toggleVisibility: The alwaysOneOpen toggle is only visible when exclusiveMode is enabled (conditional rendering)
implementationNotes.dataAttributes: Used boolean data attributes (data-exclusive-mode, data-always-one-open) for JS to read block settings

qaRecommendations: Test exclusive mode: opening item B should close item A
Test always-one-open: trying to close the only open item should fail (item stays open)
Test auto-open: with alwaysOneOpen enabled and no openByDefault items, first item should open on page load
Test border styling: open items should have charcoal border (not accent-lighter)
Test background styling: open items should still have accent-lighter background
Test editor controls: alwaysOneOpen toggle should only appear when exclusiveMode is true
Test without exclusive mode: multiple items should be able to stay open simultaneously
